nodes.label: AI as professional writing editor
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable editor requiring micromanagement
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to review and edit professional writing like emails and proposals

nodes.label: AI as creative brainstorming partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as uncreative or irrelevant idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: look for ideas - appropriate images for training content that may more creatively represent the concepts

nodes.label: AI as knowledge verifier for terminology and models
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of mixed or incorrect information
nodes.grounding_span: If I'm unsure about definitions or models, I confirm with AI

nodes.label: AI as first draft creator
nodes.label_negative: AI as untrustworthy first draft generator requiring full fact-check
nodes.grounding_span: I would like to be able to use it more for creating 1st drafts as that is time-consuming, but would have to trust it more

nodes.label: AI consistency and reliability in iterative editing
nodes.label_negative: AI inconsistency and regression in editing
nodes.grounding_span: the model re-edits its own work again with reason - sometimes reverting to my original draft as if it was an improvement

nodes.label: AI adherence to user instructions
nodes.grounding_span: The model provided data that did not incorporate that costs as requested

nodes.label: Professional credibility and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I am an expert but don't want to lose credibility by slipping up because I'm tired or distracted

nodes.label: Creative expression and engagement
nodes.grounding_span: I received a lot of compliments for making the content more interesting than the blue and white technical stock images

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: This save me so much time sifting through thousands of stock images

nodes.label: Personal style and autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I have a personal style of writing training materials and delivering them that is distinct from the standard approach

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for creative image ideas
nodes.grounding_span: This save me so much time sifting through thousands of stock images and I received a lot of compliments

nodes.label: Frustration with AI inconsistency in editing
nodes.grounding_span: What frustrates me most is when we go back and forth and AI makes edits, I make a new request about the same material, and the model re-edits its own work again with reason - sometimes reverting to my original draft

nodes.label: Frustration with AI not following instructions
nodes.grounding_span: The model provided data that did not incorporate that costs as requested. I asked for correction - it acknowledged it had messed up - then provided the exact same table of data

nodes.label: Cautious optimism about AI for first drafts
nodes.grounding_span: I would like to be able to use it more for creating 1st drafts as that is time-consuming, but would have to trust it more

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through precise prompting
nodes.grounding_span: I think I am getting better at it - wording question and giving more precise directions to get what I need in fewer rounds

nodes.label: Preference for maintaining authorial control over initial drafts
nodes.grounding_span: I generally write the first draft of everything and then ask AI for help editing
